title: tidyqpcr User Interview Transcripts
author: Sam Haynes
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Transcripts of a series of tidyqpcr user interviews. 

 tidyqpcr is an R package for the analysis and design of qPCR assays. https://github.com/ropensci/tidyqpcr 

 The interviews were conducted over zoom and transcribed by otter.io
steps_raw:
Transcripts of a series of tidyqpcr user interviews. 

 tidyqpcr is an R package for the analysis and design of qPCR assays. https://github.com/ropensci/tidyqpcr 

 The interviews were conducted over zoom and transcribed by otter.io
